pillars.name: Family
pillars.story: Replace with: 2–3 sentences about family and what it means to you. Be specific — a real moment lands better than a general sentiment.
pillars.shapeWork: Replace with: one sentence on how this shapes how you work and why it makes your work better.

pillars.name: Craft
pillars.story: Replace with: 2–3 sentences about your relationship with craft. Why does making things well matter to you?
pillars.shapeWork: Replace with: one sentence on how this drives your standards and output.

pillars.name: Play
pillars.story: Replace with: 2–3 sentences about what you do for play — homelab, gear, video projects, anything that isn't "work" but totally is.
pillars.shapeWork: Replace with: one sentence on how play feeds back into your best work.
